projects.title: My Projects
projects.name: Name
projects.empty: No projects yet. Create the first one!

tour.listDesc: Open a project to edit its canvas.

consent.message: We use cookies and collect access data (IP, device and visited pages) to understand how the system is used. Nothing is collected before you accept.

privacy.title: Privacy & data protection
privacy.intro: This policy describes, in line with Brazil's LGPD (Law 13.709/2018), which data we collect, why, and how you can exercise your rights.

collected.title: Data collected
collected.body: After you accept, we record access data: IP address, browser, operating system and device type, along with the routes accessed, HTTP method, response code and timestamp. Geographic location may be derived from the IP when that feature is enabled.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.body: The data is used to understand system usage, measure traffic, diagnose issues and improve the experience. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing.

legalBasis.title: Legal basis
legalBasis.body: Processing is based on your consent (LGPD art. 7, I). No per-request observation is recorded before explicit acceptance; if you decline, no behavioral data is collected.

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: We keep access data only as long as needed for the purposes above. You may request deletion at any time — removal is permanent, with no backup copies.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You may confirm the existence of processing, access, correct, withdraw consent and request deletion of your data, per LGPD arts. 9 and 18.

exercise.title: How to exercise
exercise.body: Authenticated users can withdraw consent and delete their own tracking data directly on this page. Other requests can be made through the system owner's contact channels.

manage.title: Manage my data
manage.description: Withdraw consent (stops future collection) or permanently delete the tracking data already collected.

privacy.withdrawn: Consent withdrawn. We will not collect new access data.
